response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong technical seniority with 20 years of software development experience and staff-level credentials, the resume critically lacks the specialized AI/ML background required for this role. The job requires a minimum of 8 years building production-grade AI solutions; the resume shows only ~1 year of explicit AI work (at current role since April 2025, focused on MCP infrastructure). More critically, Python is not listed among technical skills despite being a primary required language, and there is no demonstrated expertise with RAG architectures, vector databases, or LLM optimization. While TypeScript proficiency and recent MCP exposure are relevant, they are insufficient to offset the fundamental gap in AI/ML domain experience.
strengths: 20 years of production software development with multiple staff-level positions demonstrating sustained technical leadership
Strong TypeScript expertise across multiple roles and recent MCP/agentic workflows experience at current position
Proven mentoring and technical education skills through workshops, code dojos, and community contributions
concerns: Python is not listed in technical skills despite being a required language for the role
Only ~1 year of visible AI/GenAI experience (current role since April 2025) versus the required minimum 8 years building production AI solutions
No demonstrated expertise with RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM performance metrics, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI)

key_factors.factor: TypeScript proficiency and current MCP experience
